element_introduction_order.element: Basic locomotion and weak melee weapon

typical_relief_triggers: Defeating monster wave in arena room
Reaching safe checkpoint room before boss
typical_tension_triggers: Entering combat arena with ambush monsters
Low health while searching for next area
Encountering new enemy type without adequate weapons
Narrow platforming over deadly void or lava
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Episodic structure with escalating difficulty: each episode introduces new enemy archetypes and weapon tiers in isolated combat chambers, building from tight, confined corridors (early levels) to sprawling arena-style rooms (later levels). Tension builds through monster closet ambushes and cumulative resource depletion; relief arrives via weapon upgrades, health caches, and solved progression puzzles. Nightmare difficulty maintains constant threat.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Dead-end alcoves and side passages contain secret areas with extra weapons, health, or shortcuts; non-essential for progression but reward exploration
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Wall textures that appear slightly different or misaligned often hide secret doors; some secrets require ledge jumps or long jumps to access

difficulty_curve.early_game: Episode 1 establishes FPS fundamentals with possessed soldiers and basic ogres in tight medieval corridors and small arena rooms. Weak weapons force precision. Skill level selection (Easy/Medium/Hard/Nightmare) gates experience.
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Episodes 2-3 introduce flying enemies (Scrags), ranged-projectile threats (Vores), and expanded weapon arsenal including rocket launcher. Combat arenas grow larger, monster counts increase, and environmental hazards (lava, void) become navigation factors.
difficulty_curve.late_game: Episode 4 finale features Shambler boss, demands rocket launcher mastery, and synthesizes all previous threat types. Low-gravity secret levels per episode provide alternative difficulty pacing.
notable_spikes: Episode 1 boss encounter (end of shareware demo)
First encounter with Fiend enemy (unpredictable jumping)

notable_level_patterns.description: Early levels channel player through tight medieval/industrial corridors (controlling engagement distance), then open into large monster-filled arenas where learned combat tactics are tested at scale
Each episode begins with player starting from scratch without previously collected items, forcing remastery of basic weapons and immediate challenge
Hidden alcoves contain weapon caches, health packs, or low-gravity challenge rooms; non-mandatory but provide resource advantages for Nightmare difficulty
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Throughout campaign, one secret level per episode

notable_level_patterns.description: START level serves as persistent hub; player selects which of 4 episodes to enter; completing each episode returns player to START and advances toward final END level
Episode 1 features traditional final-level boss; later episodes distribute boss encounters differently, building toward Episode 4 Shambler finale
